title: ailanthus glandulosa var. sutchuenensis
intro: Ailanthus glandulosa var. sutchuenensis, also known as the Chinese tree of heaven, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Ailanthus glandulosa var. sutchuenensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and branches are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are said to provide a range of health benefits when consumed.
